channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 3 of the best LLM integration tools for R
item.description: When we first looked at this space in late 2023, many generative AI R packages focused largely on OpenAI and ChatGPT-like functionality or coding add-ins. Today, the landscape includes packages that natively support more LLM suppliers—including models run locally on your own computer.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Musk outlines DOGE work in rare TV interview
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk offered new details about the work of President Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) on Monday, while doubling down on the group’s efforts amid mounting criticism.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Voice-cloning companies hit for lack of safeguards against scammers
item.description: Companies creating generative AI (genAI) tools that can clone voices are not doing enough to prevent scammers from using them to defraud customers, according to a study from Consumer Reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft is developing its own AI models to compete with OpenAI
item.description: One of the hottest trends right now involves work on reasoning AI models — tools that can more or less arrive at the right conclusion on their own. (The best-known reasoning models at the moment are the Chinese Deepseek-R1, as well as o1 and o3-mini from OpenAI.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: What to Expect
item.description: Nvidia's GTC 2025 conference is expected to further solidify Nvidia's position as an AI leader with practical applications of generative AI, advancements in GPUs for power efficiency and scalability, and a focus on edge AI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Building generative AI? Get ready for generative UI
item.description: There’s currently no stopping generative AI spending. Analyst firm Omdia expects spending on generative AI applications to hit $58 billion by 2028. Yet while this level of investment is a significant amount, actual deployment of generative AI applications is still slow.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: How genomics and AI could help treat cancer more effectively
item.description: “These discoveries highlight how genetic profiling can play a crucial role in personalizing cancer care,” Ruishan Liu said in a news release.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Helping DOGE cut waste
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At the tactical edge, Army wants 58 zero trust capabilities
item.description: CWO Four Ben Koontz, the director of the Army’s functional management office for zero trust, said a recent pilot successfully tested these cyber tools. The post At the tactical edge, Army wants 58 zero trust capabilities first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Sovereign European Cloud API claims to offer interoperability without lock-in
item.description: Europe’s efforts to free itself from the domination of US cloud platforms have reached an important first milestone with the announcement of the Sovereign European Cloud API (SECA).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Albania shuts down TikTok for a year amid concerns over violence among children
item.description: TIRANA, Albania (AP) — The Albanian Cabinet decided on Thursday to shut down TikTok for 12 months, blaming the popular video-sharing platform for inciting violence and bullying, especially among children.
item.dc:creator: LLAZAR SEMINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Utah becomes the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify ages
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Utah on Wednesday became the first state to pass legislation requiring app stores to verify users’ ages and get parental consent for minors to download apps to their devices. The bill headed to the desk of Gov.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Data center vacancies hit historic lows despite record construction
item.description: The supply of data center space in major markets increased by 34% year-over-year to 6,922.6 megawatts in 2024, according to research from CBRE. That rate of growth is considerably higher than the 26% increase seen in 2023, the commercial real estate service provider notes.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tax scam alert: How to protect yourself and your tax refund
item.description: A cybersecurity firm has shed some light on just how common tax scams have become. Kurt the CyberGuy offers his advice for how to protect your refund.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
